questions: Q1: What is the scope of CLI changes needed for GOAL mode support?

answers.answer: Minimal: add 'GOAL' to the VALID_MODES const tuple at create.ts line 12 and update the usage text at line 16. The validation logic (lines 78-87) normalizes input to uppercase and checks against VALID_MODES.join() — it handles additions automatically with no new code. Goal-specific CLI commands (hlx goals status, proposals, approve) are explicitly deferred per research report Section 8.3.
evidence: create.ts line 12: const VALID_MODES = ['AUTO','BUILD','FIX','RESEARCH','EXECUTE'] as const — add 'GOAL'
create.ts line 16: usage text lists modes — add GOAL
create.ts lines 78-87: validation normalizes to uppercase, checks includes(), errors with VALID_MODES.join() — handles additions automatically

statement: CLI changes are minimal: add GOAL to the VALID_MODES const array and usage text in create.ts. Two lines changed, zero new logic. Validation pattern handles the addition automatically. Goal-specific CLI commands are explicitly deferred per the research report.
